claim_text: Patient presented with acute lower back pain radiating to the left leg. Treating physician ordered an MRI of the lumbar spine (CPT 72148) to rule out disc herniation. Patient has a history of chronic lumbar pain treated conservatively for 6 weeks without improvement prior to imaging.
label: accepted

supporting_docs.provider_notes: Conservative treatment for 6 weeks failed. Imaging required to rule out surgical pathology.

claim_text: Patient requested a full-body PET scan for general wellness screening. No specific symptoms reported. Patient states they want a baseline scan for peace of mind. No prior diagnostic workup performed.
label: rejected

supporting_docs.provider_notes: Patient requested preventive full-body scan, no clinical indication documented.

claim_text: 28-year-old patient with newly diagnosed Type 1 diabetes referred for continuous glucose monitoring system (CGM) setup and training. Patient is on insulin therapy and has experienced two hypoglycemic episodes in the past month. Endocrinologist documents medical necessity.
label: accepted

supporting_docs.procedure_description: Ambulatory continuous glucose monitoring, interpretation and report
supporting_docs.provider_notes: Type 1 diabetic on insulin with documented hypoglycemic events. CGM medically necessary for safe glucose management.
